title: Pagination View Models, Immutable State, Map Transitions, and Stale Results · Type-System Trace: Pokedex Ts Candidate State
summary: The map command mutates offset before validation, exposes transport results to the UI, allows an older promise to overwrite a newer page, and assumes previous means offset minus limit. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts candidate state increment in immutable stale-safe Pokemon page state. Learners progress through prediction…
objectives: Derive candidate navigation and commit only a validated successful page while preserving prior state on failure.
Convert validated transport pages into readonly resource, cursor, result identity, count, and source metadata.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
